body:
This PR adds the "Zonal Flow over an Isolated Mountain Test Case" to the Shallow-water equations solver on the sphere. 

This test case is Test Case 5 in Williamson "A standard test set for numerical approximations to the shallow water equations in spherical geometry", 1992. 

Initially, I added TC 5 as a separate file, leaving the existing `shallow_water.jl` file with the steady-state test, that is Test Case 2 in the same reference paper, unchanged. Then, I decided to merge the two test cases in one file, since they are almost identical (the only difference is the bottom surface topography `h_s`, but the flow and IC are the same).
title: Shallow-water Test Case: Add Flow over an Isolated Mountain

body:
Refactors the parameters of the LocalGeometry struct to work towards the various vector fixes (#264):
- the reference coordinate system is now always a LocalAxis, not a CartesianAxis
- this makes will make it easier to dispatch appropriately when dealing with the curl problem (3 of #264).
title: LocalGeometry refactor

body: Fixes #274. Also cleaned up some of the vector conversion functions
title: Fix cross product
